heading: Regulations
label: 8302 Regulations
text: The President may prescribe regulations for the administration of the preceding sections of this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6252(10th, and last 47 words).34 U.S.C. 364(as applicable to regulations), ; renumbered § 11 and amended , .Feb. 4, 1919, ch. 14, § 940 Stat. 1057Aug. 7, 1942, ch. 551, § 156 Stat. 745(1st 9 words of 1st sentence).34 U.S.C. 364a(1st 9 words of 1st sentence), ; , .July 2, 1926, ch. 721, § 1244 Stat. 789July 30, 1937, ch. 545, § 450 Stat. 549The words “further”, “from time to time any and all rules”, “orders which he shall deem necessary”, and “to execute full purpose and intention thereof” are omitted as surplusage.

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8302, , , related to promotion to captain, major, or lieutenant colonel of commissioned medical, dental, or veterinary officers in Regular Air Force upon examination of professional fitness and effect upon failure of promotion, prior to repeal by , , , effective . See sections 631 and 632 of this title.act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 104170A Stat. 513Pub. L. 96–513, title II, § 20494 Stat. 2880Dec. 12, 1980Sept. 15, 1981
